name: Are we Merging the Right Models? Impact of Expert Training Duration on Model Merging for LLMs
summary: arXiv:2607.11997v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multi-task model merging combines separately trained expert models into a single model that handles all tasks without co-training. Standard...
description: arXiv:2607.11997v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multi-task model merging combines separately trained expert models into a single model that handles all tasks without co-training. Standard practice merges experts at their optimal validation loss. We challenge this convention by systematically studying how training duration of domain experts affects the quality of the merged model. We f...
author: Nikita Kozodoi, Zainab Afolabi, Jack Butler
